# Claru

> Claru provides purpose-built training data for physical AI, robotics, and embodied intelligence — 4M+ human annotations, 500K+ egocentric videos, 10K+ collectors across 100+ cities on 6 continents.

Claru (operated by Reka AI Inc.) is the only training data company 100% focused on physical AI. Unlike generic data labeling platforms, Claru specializes in the data modalities robotics needs: egocentric video, teleoperation recordings, manipulation sequences, and multi-view captures. Every dataset ships enriched with depth maps (Depth Anything V2), pose estimation (ViTPose), segmentation masks (SAM3), optical flow (RAFT), and structured action labels.

## Core Pages

- [Training Data for Physical AI](https://claru.ai/): Homepage with company overview, key statistics (4M+ annotations, 500K+ videos, 10K+ collectors), service overview (capture, enrich, annotate, deliver), and contact form.
- [Data Catalog](https://claru.ai/data-catalog): Browse 100+ datasets with filtering by modality, environment, annotation type. Includes egocentric video, teleoperation, game environments, and multi-view captures.
- [Solutions Overview](https://claru.ai/solutions): Hub page linking to all data solutions — egocentric video, manipulation trajectories, teleoperation, RLHF, video annotation, red teaming.
- [About Claru](https://claru.ai/about): Company background, founding story, team credentials (ex-FAANG engineers), mission to close the data gap for frontier robotics labs.
- [Compare Data Providers](https://claru.ai/compare): Hub page with side-by-side comparisons of Claru vs 90+ data providers including Scale AI, Appen, Labelbox, Encord, V7, and iMerit.

## Training Data Solutions

- [Egocentric Video Data](https://claru.ai/solutions/egocentric-video-data): 500K+ first-person video clips from kitchen, workshop, warehouse, outdoor, and office environments. Collected by 10K+ workers with standardized camera rigs.
- [Manipulation Trajectory Data](https://claru.ai/solutions/manipulation-trajectory-data): Teleoperation recordings with 6/7-DoF end-effector action labels at 10-50 Hz. Compatible with VLA models (OpenVLA, Octo, RT-2).
- [Teleoperation Data](https://claru.ai/solutions/teleoperation-data): Remote-operated robot demonstrations with synchronized multi-camera + action + proprioceptive streams.
- [RLHF Labeling](https://claru.ai/solutions/rlhf-labeling-data): Pairwise preference annotations and reward modeling data for robot behavior alignment.
- [Video Annotation](https://claru.ai/solutions/video-annotation-data): Frame-level bounding boxes, segmentation masks, keypoints, temporal action labels, and object tracking annotations.
- [Red Teaming](https://claru.ai/solutions/red-teaming-data): Adversarial prompt testing, safety boundary evaluation, and failure mode discovery for AI models.
- [Synthetic Data Validation](https://claru.ai/solutions/synthetic-data-validation): Quality assessment of simulation-generated data against real-world baselines.

## GEO Landing Pages

- [Training Data for Robotics](https://claru.ai/training-data-for-robotics): Comprehensive guide to robotics training data — what it is, why quality matters, and how Claru provides it.
- [Physical AI Training Data](https://claru.ai/physical-ai-training-data): Overview of training data needs for physical AI systems including robots, autonomous vehicles, and drones.
- [Egocentric Video Datasets](https://claru.ai/egocentric-video-datasets): Guide to egocentric (first-person) video datasets for activity recognition, manipulation learning, and embodied AI.
- [Embodied AI Datasets](https://claru.ai/embodied-ai-datasets): Training data for embodied AI agents — navigation, manipulation, and interaction in real-world environments.


## Glossary (70 terms)

## Model Training Data (25 models)

- [How to Measure Inter-Annotator Agreement for Robot Data](https://claru.ai/guides/how-to-measure-inter-annotator-agreement): Step-by-step guide with prerequisites, tools, and practical tips.
- [How to Preprocess Point Clouds for Robot Training](https://claru.ai/guides/how-to-preprocess-point-clouds-for-training): Step-by-step guide with prerequisites, tools, and practical tips.
- [How to Set Up a Teleoperation Rig for Data Collection](https://claru.ai/guides/how-to-setup-a-teleoperation-rig): Step-by-step guide with prerequisites, tools, and practical tips.
- [How to Set Up a Data Quality Pipeline for Robot Datasets](https://claru.ai/guides/how-to-setup-data-quality-pipeline): Step-by-step guide with prerequisites, tools, and practical tips.
- [How to Set Up a Domain Randomization Pipeline](https://claru.ai/guides/how-to-setup-domain-randomization-pipeline): Step-by-step guide with prerequisites, tools, and practical tips.
- [How to Train a Diffusion Policy from Demonstration Data](https://claru.ai/guides/how-to-train-a-diffusion-policy): Step-by-step guide with prerequisites, tools, and practical tips.

## Task Training Data (30 tasks)

- [aerial-manipulation Training Data](https://claru.ai/training-data/aerial-manipulation): Data requirements, modalities, volume benchmarks, and collection methodology for aerial-manipulation tasks.
- [agricultural-robotics Training Data](https://claru.ai/training-data/agricultural-robotics): Data requirements, modalities, volume benchmarks, and collection methodology for agricultural-robotics tasks.
- [assembly Training Data](https://claru.ai/training-data/assembly): Data requirements, modalities, volume benchmarks, and collection methodology for assembly tasks.

- [kitchen-tasks Training Data](https://claru.ai/training-data/kitchen-tasks): Data requirements, modalities, volume benchmarks, and collection methodology for kitchen-tasks tasks.

- [tool-use Training Data](https://claru.ai/training-data/tool-use): Data requirements, modalities, volume benchmarks, and collection methodology for tool-use tasks.
- [underwater-manipulation Training Data](https://claru.ai/training-data/underwater-manipulation): Data requirements, modalities, volume benchmarks, and collection methodology for underwater-manipulation tasks.

## Data Formats (15 formats)

- [arrow-format Format](https://claru.ai/formats/arrow-format): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.
- [bop-format Format](https://claru.ai/formats/bop-format): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.
- [coco-format Format](https://claru.ai/formats/coco-format): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.

- [nuscenes-format Format](https://claru.ai/formats/nuscenes-format): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.
- [open3d-format Format](https://claru.ai/formats/open3d-format): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.
- [protobuf-robotics Format](https://claru.ai/formats/protobuf-robotics): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.
- [rlds Format](https://claru.ai/formats/rlds): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.
- [ros-bag Format](https://claru.ai/formats/ros-bag): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.
- [tfds Format](https://claru.ai/formats/tfds): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.
- [webdataset Format](https://claru.ai/formats/webdataset): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.
- [zarr Format](https://claru.ai/formats/zarr): Technical specification, when to use, comparison with alternatives, and conversion guides.

- [Training Data for unitree](https://claru.ai/for/unitree): Research focus, data needs analysis, and how Claru data maps to this lab's requirements.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2024
- Legal entity: Reka AI Inc. (d/b/a Claru AI)
- Focus: 100% physical AI and robotics training data (not general-purpose labeling)
- Data scale: 4M+ human annotations, 500K+ egocentric video clips, 100+ active datasets
- Workforce: 10,000+ data collectors across 100+ cities, 6 continents, 14+ countries
- Partnerships: 5+ frontier AI lab partnerships
- Key datasets: Egocentric video (kitchen, warehouse, workshop, outdoor), teleoperation recordings (tabletop, kitchen, warehouse), game environments, multi-view manipulation
- Enrichment pipeline: Every clip automatically enriched with depth maps (Depth Anything V2), pose estimation (ViTPose), segmentation masks (SAM3), optical flow (RAFT), and structured action labels
- Delivery formats: RLDS, HDF5, zarr, LeRobot, WebDataset, ROS bag, MCAP, Arrow, protobuf
- Compatible models: OpenVLA, RT-2, Octo, pi-zero, ACT/ALOHA, GR00T N1, Diffusion Policy, HPT, CrossFormer
- Contact: contact@claru.ai
- Website: https://claru.ai

## Contact

- Website: https://claru.ai
- Email: contact@claru.ai
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/claru
